pages.text: A cat can get Chills for many reasons... It is mostly associated to a very low body temperature, but chills might also be caused by severe injuries and other conditions.$(br)
pages.title: Chills
Chills
pages.text: Chills can be treated using Feverfew, this herb is excellent at regulating body temperature.$(br)

pages.title: Chills
pages.text: Since cats in shock can also get chills, Poppy Seeds can also help calm a cat down and regulate their body.$(br)

pages.title: Chills
pages.text: Among the many different uses of Juniper, these berries are also good for chills.$(br)
